data.name: Msg_EmptyDocument
data.value: The document does not contain any pages.

data.name: SB_PageOfPagesHint
data.value: Page number in document. Click to open the Go To Page dialog.

data.name: UD_Hint_ForegroundColor
data.value: Set the foreground color of the control

data.name: UD_Hint_BackGroundColor
data.value: Set the background color of the control

data.name: UD_Hint_JustifyLeft
data.value: Align the control's text to the left

data.name: UD_Hint_JustifyCenter
data.value: Align the control's text to the center

data.name: UD_Hint_JustifyRight
data.value: Align the control's text to the right

data.name: UD_Hint_AlignToGrid
data.value: Align the positions of the selected controls to the grid

data.name: UD_Hint_AlignCenters
data.value: Align the centers of the selected controls vertically

data.name: UD_Hint_AlignTops
data.value: Align the tops of the selected controls

data.name: UD_Hint_AlignMiddles
data.value: Align the centers of the selected controls horizontally

data.name: UD_Hint_AlignBottoms
data.value: Align the bottoms of the selected controls

data.name: UD_Hint_MakeSameSizeWidth
data.value: Make the selected controls have the same width

data.name: UD_Hint_MakeSameSizeSizeToGrid
data.value: Size the selected controls to the grid

data.name: UD_Hint_MakeSameSizeHeight
data.value: Make the selected controls have the same height

data.name: UD_Hint_MakeSameSizeBoth
data.value: Make the selected controls the same size

data.name: UD_Hint_SpacingMakeEqual
data.value: Make the spacing between the selected controls equal

data.name: UD_Hint_SpacingIncrease
data.value: Increase the spacing between the selected controls

data.name: UD_Hint_SpacingDecrease
data.value: Decrease the spacing between the selected controls

data.name: UD_Hint_SpacingRemove
data.value: Remove the spacing between the selected controls

data.name: UD_Hint_CenterInFormHorizontally
data.value: Horizontally center the selected controls within a band

data.name: UD_Hint_CenterInFormVertically
data.value: Vertically center the selected controls within a band

data.name: UD_Hint_OrderBringToFront
data.value: Bring the selected controls to the front

data.name: UD_Hint_OrderSendToBack
data.value: Move the selected controls to the back

data.name: UD_Hint_Cut
data.value: Delete the control and copy it to the clipboard

data.name: UD_Hint_Copy
data.value: Copy the control to the clipboard

data.name: UD_Hint_Paste
data.value: Add the control from the clipboard

data.name: UD_Hint_NewWizardReport
data.value: Create a new report using the Wizard

data.name: UD_Hint_SaveFileAs
data.value: Save the report with a new name

data.name: UD_Hint_SelectAll
data.value: Select all the controls in the document

data.name: UD_Hint_TabbedInterface
data.value: Switch between tabbed and window MDI layout modes

data.name: UD_Hint_MdiCascade
data.value: Arrange all open documents cascaded, so that they overlap each other

data.name: UD_Hint_MdiTileHorizontal
data.value: Arrange all open documents from top to bottom

data.name: UD_Hint_MdiTileVertical
data.value: Arrange all open documents from left to right

data.name: UD_Hint_Zoom
data.value: Select or input the zoom factor

data.name: Msg_WarningControlsAreOverlapped
data.value: Export warning: The following controls are overlapped and may be exported to HTML, RTF, XLS, XLSX, CSV and Text incorrectly - {0}.

data.name: Msg_WarningControlsAreOutOfMargin
data.value: Printing warning: The following controls are outside the right page margin, and this will cause extra pages to be printed - {0}.

data.name: Msg_WarningUnsavedReports
data.value: Printing warning: Save the following reports to preview subreports with recent changes applied - {0}.

data.name: Msg_WrongPrinter
data.value: The printer name is invalid. Please check the printer settings.

data.name: Msg_WrongPrinting
data.value: An error occurred during printing a document.

data.name: Msg_WrongPageSettings
data.value: The current printer doesn't support the selected paper size. Proceed with printing anyway?

data.name: Msg_PageMarginsWarning
data.value: One or more margins are set outside the printable area of the page. Continue?

data.name: Msg_IncorrectPageRange
data.value: This is not a valid page range

data.name: Msg_FontInvalidNumber
data.value: The font size cannot be set to zero or a negative number

data.name: Msg_NotSupportedFont
data.value: This font is not yet supported

data.name: Msg_IncorrectZoomFactor
data.value: The number must be between {0} and {1}.

data.name: Msg_InvalidMeasurement
data.value: This is not a valid measurement.

data.name: Msg_CannotAccessFile
data.value: The process cannot access the file "{0}" because it is being used by another process.

data.name: Msg_FileReadOnly
data.value: File "{0}" is set to read-only, try again with a different file name.

data.name: Msg_OpenFileQuestion
data.value: Do you want to open this file?

data.name: Msg_CantFitBarcodeToControlBounds
data.value: Control's boundaries are too small for the barcode

data.name: Msg_InvalidBarcodeText
data.value: There are invalid characters in the text

data.name: Msg_InvalidBarcodeData
data.value: Binary data can't be longer than 1033 bytes.

data.name: Msg_NoDifferentFilesInStream
data.value: A document can't be exported to a stream in the DifferentFiles mode. Use the SingleFile or SingleFilePageByPage mode instead.

data.name: Msg_BigFileToCreate
data.value: The output file is too big. Try to reduce the number of its pages, or split it into several documents.

data.name: Msg_BigFileToCreateJPEG
data.value: The output file is too big to create a JPEG file. Please choose another image format or another export mode.

data.name: Msg_BigBitmapToCreate
data.value: The output file is too big. Please try to reduce the image resolution, or choose another export mode.

data.name: Msg_XlsMoreThanMaxRows
data.value: The created XLS file is too big for the XLS format, because it contains more than 65,536 rows. Please try to use the XLSX format, instead.

data.name: Msg_XlsMoreThanMaxColumns
data.value: The created XLS file is too big for the XLS format, because it contains more than 256 columns. Please try to use the XLSX format, instead.

data.name: Msg_XlsxMoreThanMaxRows
data.value: The created XLSX file is too big for the XLSX format, because it contains more than 1,048,576 rows. Please try to reduce the amount of rows in your report and export the report to XLSX again.

data.name: Msg_XlsxMoreThanMaxColumns
data.value: The created XLSX file is too big for the XLSX format, because it contains more than 16,384 columns. Please try to reduce the amount of columns in your report and export the report to XLSX again.

data.name: Msg_FileDoesNotHavePrnxExtention
data.value: The specified file doesn't have a PRNX extension. Proceed anyway?

data.name: Msg_FileDoesNotContainValidXml
data.value: The specified file doesn't contain valid XML data in the PRNX format. Loading is stopped.

data.name: Msg_GoToNonExistentPage
data.value: There is no page numbered {0} in this document.

data.name: Msg_PathTooLong
data.value: The path is too long. Try a shorter name.

data.name: Msg_CannotLoadDocument
data.value: The specified file cannot be loaded, because it either does not contain valid XML data or exceeds the allowed size.

data.name: Msg_NoParameters
data.value: The specified parameters do not exist: {0}.

data.name: Msg_SeparatorCannotBeEmptyString
data.value: The separator cannot be an empty string.

data.name: Msg_FileAlreadyExists
data.value: The output file already exists. Click OK to overwrite.

data.name: ExportOption_PdfChangingPermissions_FillingSigning
data.value: Filling in form fields and signing existing signature fields

data.name: ExportOption_PdfChangingPermissions_CommentingFillingSigning
data.value: Commenting, filling in form fields, and signing existing signature fields

data.name: ExportOption_ConfirmOpenPasswordForm_Note
data.value: Please confirm the Document Open Password. Be sure to make a note of the password. It will be required to open the document.

data.name: ExportOption_ConfirmPermissionsPasswordForm_Note
data.value: Please confirm the Permissions Password. Be sure to make a note of the password. You will need it to change these settings in the future.

data.name: ExportOption_ConfirmationDoesNotMatchForm_Msg
data.value: Confirmation password does not match. Please start over and enter the password again.

data.name: FolderBrowseDlg_ExportDirectory
data.value: Select a folder to save the exported document to:

data.name: RibbonPreview_DocumentMap_STipContent
data.value: Open the Document Map, which allows you to navigate through a structural view of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Parameters_STipContent
data.value: Open the Parameters pane, which allows you to enter values for report parameters.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Find_STipContent
data.value: Show the Find dialog to find text in the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_HandTool_STipContent
data.value: Invoke the Hand tool to manually scroll through pages.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Customize_STipContent
data.value: Open the Print Options dialog, in which you can change printing options.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Print_STipContent
data.value: Select a printer, number of copies and other printing options before printing.

data.name: RibbonPreview_PrintDirect_STipContent
data.value: Send the document directly to the default printer without making changes.

data.name: RibbonPreview_EditPageHF_STipContent
data.value: Edit the header and footer of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Magnifier_STipContent
data.value:
Invoke the Magnifier tool.
Clicking once on a document zooms it so that a single page becomes entirely visible, while clicking another time zooms it to 100% of the normal size.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ZoomOut_STipContent
data.value: Zoom out to see more of the page at a reduced size.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ZoomIn_STipContent
data.value: Zoom in to get a close-up view of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ShowFirstPage_STipContent
data.value: Navigate to the first page of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ShowPrevPage_STipContent
data.value: Navigate to the previous page of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ShowNextPage_STipContent
data.value: Navigate to the next page of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ShowLastPage_STipContent
data.value: Navigate to the last page of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_MultiplePages_STipContent
data.value: Choose the page layout to arrange the document pages in preview.

data.name: RibbonPreview_FillBackground_STipContent
data.value: Choose a color for the background of the document pages.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Watermark_STipContent
data.value:
Insert ghosted text or image behind the content of a page.
This is often used to indicate that a document is to be treated specially.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportFile_STipContent
data.value: Export the current document in one of the available formats, and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendFile_STipContent
data.value: Export the current document in one of the available formats, and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ClosePreview_STipContent
data.value: Close Print Preview of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Scale_STipContent
data.value: Stretch or shrink the printed output to a percentage of its actual size.

data.name: RibbonPreview_PageOrientation_STipContent
data.value: Switch the pages between portrait and landscape layouts.

data.name: RibbonPreview_PaperSize_STipContent
data.value: Choose the paper size of the document.

data.name: RibbonPreview_PageMargins_STipContent
data.value:
Select the margin sizes for the entire document.
To apply specific margin sizes to the document, click Custom Margins.

data.name: RibbonPreview_Zoom_STipContent
data.value: Change the zoom level of the document preview.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportGraphic_Description
data.value: BMP, GIF, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, EMF, WMF

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendGraphic_Description
data.value: BMP, GIF, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, EMF, WMF

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportPdf_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to PDF and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportHtm_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to HTML and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportTxt_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to Text and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportCsv_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to CSV and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportMht_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to MHT and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportXls_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to XLS and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportXlsx_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to XLSX and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportRtf_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to RTF and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_ExportGraphic_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to Image and save it to the file on a disk.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendPdf_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to PDF and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendTxt_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to Text and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendCsv_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to CSV and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendMht_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to MHT and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendXls_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to XLS and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendXlsx_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to XLSX and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendRtf_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to RTF and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: RibbonPreview_SendGraphic_STipContent
data.value: Export the document to Image and attach it to the e-mail.

data.name: Msg_WarningFontNameCantBeEmpty
data.value: The Font name can't be empty.

data.name: Msg_WrongReportClassName
data.value: An error occurred during deserialization - possible wrong report class name

data.name: Msg_CreateReportInstance
data.value: The report currently being edited is of a different type than the one you are trying to open. Do you want to open the selected report anyway?

data.name: Msg_FileCorrupted
data.value: Can't load the report. The file is possibly corrupted or report's assembly is missing.

data.name: Msg_FileContentCorrupted
data.value: Can't load the report's layout. The file is possibly corrupted or contains incorrect information.

data.name: Msg_InvalidMethodCall
data.value: This method call is invalid for the object's current state

data.name: Msg_ScriptError
data.value: There are following errors in script(s): {0}

data.name: Msg_ScriptExecutionError
Msg_InvalidReportSource
data.value: The 'ReportSource' property of a subreport control cannot be set to a descendant of the current report

data.name: Msg_CreateSomeInstance
data.value: Can't create two instances of a class on a form

data.name: Msg_FillDataError
data.value: Error when trying to populate the datasource. The following exception was thrown:

data.name: Msg_PlacingXrTocIntoIncorrectContainer
data.value: The XRTableOfContents control can be placed only into Report Header and Report Footer bands.

data.name: Msg_NoBookmarksWereFoundInReportForXrToc
data.value: No bookmarks were found in the report. To create a table of contents, specify a bookmark for at least one report element.

data.name: Msg_InvalidXrTocInstance
data.value: No more instances of XRTableOfContents can be added to the report.

data.name: Msg_InvalidXrTocInstanceInBand
data.value: No more instances of XRTableOfContents can be added to the band.

data.name: Msg_CyclicBookmarks
data.value: There are cyclic bookmarks in the report.

data.name: Msg_ScriptingPermissionErrorMessage
Msg_ReportImporting
data.value: Importing a report layout. Please, wait...

data.name: Msg_IncorrectPadding
data.value: The padding should be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Msg_ShapeRotationToolTip
data.value: Use Ctrl with the left mouse button to rotate the shape

data.name: Msg_WarningRemoveCalculatedFields
data.value: This operation will remove all calculated fields from all data tables. Do you wish to proceed?

data.name: Msg_WarningRemoveParameters
data.value: This operation will remove all parameters. Do you wish to proceed?

data.name: Msg_InvalidExpression
data.value: The specified expression contains invalid symbols (line {0}, character {1}).

data.name: Msg_GroupSortWarning
data.value: The group header or footer you want to delete is not empty. Do you want to delete this band along with its controls?

data.name: Msg_GroupSortNoDataSource
data.value: To add a new grouping or sorting level, first provide a data source for the report.

data.name: Msg_NotEnoughMemoryToPaint
data.value: Not enough memory to paint. Zoom level will be reset.

data.name: UD_Msg_ReportChanged
data.value: Report has been changed. Do you want to save changes ?

data.name: UD_Msg_MdiReportChanged
data.value: "{0}" has been changed. Do you want to save changes ?

data.name: UD_TTip_ItemDescription
UD_TTip_TableDescription
FRSForm_Msg_MoreThanOneRule
data.value: You selected more than one formatting rule

data.name: SSForm_Msg_MoreThanOneStyle
data.value: You selected more than one style

data.name: ScriptEditor_ScriptHasBeenChanged
data.value: The error log is unrelated to the actual script, because the script has been changed after its last validation. To see the actual script errors, click the Validate button again.

data.name: PanelDesignMsg
data.value: Place controls here to keep them together

data.name: MultiColumnDesignMsg2
data.value: Controls placed here will be printed incorrectly.

data.name: STag_Name_FieldArea
data.value: Field Area for a New Field

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_AlignToGrid_STipContent
data.value: Align the positions of the selected controls to the grid.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_AlignVerticalCenters_STipContent
data.value: Align the centers of the selected controls vertically.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_AlignTop_STipContent
data.value: Align the tops of the selected controls.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_AlignHorizontalCenters_STipContent
data.value: Align the centers of the selected controls horizontally.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_AlignBottom_STipContent
data.value: Align the bottoms of the selected controls.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_SizeToControlWidth_STipContent
data.value: Make the selected controls have the same width.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_SizeToGrid_STipContent
data.value: Size the selected controls to the grid.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_SizeToControlHeight_STipContent
data.value: Make the selected controls have the same height.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_SizeToControl_STipContent
data.value: Make the selected controls have the same size.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_HorizSpaceMakeEqual_STipContent
data.value: Make the horizontal spacing between the selected controls equal.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_HorizSpaceIncrease_STipContent
data.value: Increase the horizontal spacing between the selected controls.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_HorizSpaceDecrease_STipContent
data.value: Decrease the horizontal spacing between the selected controls.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_HorizSpaceConcatenate_STipContent
data.value: Remove the horizontal spacing between the selected controls.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_VertSpaceMakeEqual_STipContent
data.value: Make the vertical spacing between the selected controls equal.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_VertSpaceIncrease_STipContent
data.value: Increase the vertical spacing between the selected controls.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_VertSpaceDecrease_STipContent
data.value: Decrease the vertical spacing between the selected controls.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_VertSpaceConcatenate_STipContent
data.value: Remove the vertical spacing between the selected controls.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_CenterHorizontally_STipContent
data.value: Horizontally center the selected controls within a band.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_CenterVertically_STipContent
data.value: Vertically center the selected controls within a band.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_BringToFront_STipContent
data.value: Bring the selected controls to the front.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_SendToBack_STipContent
data.value: Move the selected controls to the back.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_JustifyJustify_STipContent
data.value: Align text to both the left and right sides, adding extra space between words as necessary.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_NewReportWizard_STipContent
data.value: Launch the report wizard to create a new report.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_SaveFileAs_STipContent
data.value: Save the current report with a new name.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_Cut_STipContent
data.value: Cut the selected controls from the report and put them on the Clipboard.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_Copy_STipContent
data.value: Copy the selected controls and put them on the Clipboard.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_Paste_STipContent
data.value: Paste the contents of the Clipboard.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_Zoom_STipContent
data.value: Change the zoom level of the document designer.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_ZoomIn_STipContent
data.value: Zoom in to get a close-up view of the report.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_ZoomOut_STipContent
data.value: Zoom out to see more of the report at a reduced size.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_Windows_STipContent
data.value: Show or hide the Tool Box, Report Explorer, Field List and Property Grid windows.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_Scripts_STipContent
data.value: Show or hide the Scripts Editor.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_HtmlBackward_STipContent
data.value: Move back to the previous page.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_HtmlForward_STipContent
data.value: Move forward to the next page.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_HtmlFind_STipContent
data.value: Find the text on this page.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_NewReportWizard_Description
data.value: Launch the report wizard to create a new report.

data.name: RibbonXRDesign_SaveFileAs_Description
data.value: Save the current report with a new name.

data.name: PivotGridForm_ItemLayout_Description
data.value: Customize the current XRPivotGrid's layout and preview its data.

data.name: PivotGridForm_GroupPrinting_Description
data.value: Printing option management for the current XRPivotGrid.

data.name: PivotGridForm_ItemAppearances_Description
data.value: Adjust the print appearances of the current XRPivotGrid.

data.name: PivotGridForm_ItemSettings_Description
data.value: Adjust the printing settings for the current XRPivotGrid.

data.name: PivotGridFrame_Fields_DescriptionText1
data.value: You can add and delete XRPivotGrid fields and modify their settings.

data.name: PivotGridFrame_Fields_DescriptionText2
data.value: Select and drag field to the PivotGrid fields panel to create PivotGrid field.

data.name: PivotGridFrame_Layouts_DescriptionText
data.value: Modify the XRPivotGrid's layout (sorting settings, field arrangement) and click the Apply button to apply the modifications to the current XRPivotGrid. You can also save the layout to an XML file (this can be loaded and applied to other views at design time and runtime).

data.name: PivotGridFrame_Appearances_DescriptionText
data.value: Select one or more of the Appearance objects to customize the printing appearances of the corresponding visual elements.

data.name: Wizard_PageChooseFields_Msg
data.value: You must select fields for the report before you continue

data.name: XRTableOfContents_LevelCollectionEditor_Title
data.value: Table of Contents Level Collection Editor
